case_title: CARTON-HODGSON,INC. VS THE MADISON AVE GROUP MR.BILL CUMMINGS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARTON-HODGSON,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THE MADISON AVE GROUP  MR.BILL CUMMINGS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO BILL CUMMINGS C/O THE MADISON AVE GROUP RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTON-HODGSON,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE MADISON AVE GROUP  MR.BILL CUMMINGS $4,969.16 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,989.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MADERA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE MADISON AVE GROUP  MR.BILL CUMMINGS
